home.heroSubtitle: Phase 1: The Golden Repair is Initializing. Join the Genesis Waitlist to help identify the first vessels for restoration.

philosophy.wabiSabiDesc: We do not discard code simply because it is flawed. We see the potential in abandoned liquidity and neglected contracts.
philosophy.kintsugiDesc: By binding broken projects with AI analysis and community governance ($GOLD), we make them stronger than before.
philosophy.zenDesc: Amidst the chaos of rug pulls and volatility, we offer a serene path to value recovery and sustainable growth.

nav.lockedTooltip: Power currently being restored. Join the waitlist for early access.

bento.senseiDesc: Transparent scanning of Solana contracts via Gemini 3 AI.
bento.assemblyDesc: Community-led voting on which projects deserve the Golden Repair.
bento.treasuryDesc: A dedicated fund to provide liquidity to mended projects.

faq.title: Wisdom of the Scroll
faq.a1: A broken project is a token with abandoned liquidity, silenced communities, or fractured code. We identify these 'dead' vessels and offer a path to restoration through algorithmic repair and community stewardship.
faq.a2: A 2% tax is applied to all $GOLD transactions. 1% flows into the Treasury to fund restorations, and 1% is burned forever, symbolizing the impurities leaving the clay during the firing process.
faq.q3: Is the Sensei AI always right?
faq.a3: The Sensei is wise, but not infallible. The Kintsugi Scanner provides a deep analysis based on patterns and heuristics, but it is a tool to guide your own intuition, not replace it. Always verify the cracks yourself.

roadmap.title: The Path of Restoration
roadmap.q1Desc: Token Launch & Community Formation. The first vessels are gathered.
roadmap.q2Desc: Mainnet Scanner Live. AI begins analyzing the shattered bytecode.
roadmap.q3Desc: DAO Launch. The community takes control of the golden glue.
roadmap.q4Desc: Cross-chain Kintsugi. Repairing liquidity across all networks.

crucible.heroTitle: Not all code can be saved.
crucible.heroSubtitle: The Kintsugi Protocol repairs the worthy. The Crucible consumes the rest. Purge your wallet of dead liquidity, burn the unsalvageable, and collect the Ash.
crucible.step1Desc: Connect your Solana wallet and select the rugged, abandoned, or malicious contracts poisoning your portfolio.
crucible.step2Desc: The smart contract permanently routes the dead tokens to a burn address, removing them from the ecosystem forever.
crucible.step3Desc: Destruction breeds creation. Receive soulbound $ASH points or micro-drips of the Kintsugi $GOLD treasury for your sacrifice.

scroll.headerSubtitle: Litepaper v1: A Vision for the Rebirth of Broken Code
scroll.disclaimer: Note: This document outlines the architectural vision for Kintsugi Protocol. All technical specifications and tokenomics are subject to community ratification during the Genesis Phase.
scroll.s1P1: In the fragmented landscape of the Solana ecosystem, volatility fractures trust. Projects launch with promise, only to be abandoned, exploited, or "rugged," leaving behind a debris field of locked liquidity and disillusioned communities.
scroll.s1P2: Traditional DeFi treats these failures as waste. Kintsugi (金継ぎ) envisions them as vessels awaiting restoration.
scroll.s1P3: Kintsugi Protocol proposes a mechanism to "mend" broken smart contracts with gold—specifically, the $GOLD utility token. By planning to identify dormant or flawed contracts via the Sensei Scanner, we aim to transform abandoned code into revitalized, community-owned assets.
scroll.s1P4: This is not merely recovery; it is an elevation. The mended vessel is designed to be stronger and more beautiful than the original. We aim to verify safety, unlock frozen value, and return power to the people, proving that in code, as in art, broken does not mean finished.
scroll.s2Card1Desc: The proposed "Sensei" AI architecture is being built to leverage Google's Gemini 3 advanced context window. It is designed to analyze raw Solana bytecode and decompile on-chain programs to detect:
scroll.s2Card1Li3: Hidden mint authorities in metadata extensions.
scroll.s2Card2Desc: Kintsugi will utilize the Solana Token-2022 Standard to implement the "Restoration Tax."
scroll.s2Card2Li1: Transfer Hook: Proposed 1% tax on all restored token transfers.
scroll.s2Card2Li2: Auto-Burn: Tax is designed to be automatically converted to $GOLD and burned.
scroll.s2Card2Li3: Zero-Knowledge: Logic executes without revealing user intent until settlement.
scroll.s3Intro: The $GOLD token is designed to be the lifeblood that fuses broken projects. Its supply model is strictly deflationary, intended to couple directly to the volume of restored projects.
scroll.s3DialNote: *Final allocations to be determined by the Genesis DAO vote.
scroll.s4Phase1Desc: Concept Generation. Community Waitlist. Sensei AI Model Training. Architecture Design.
scroll.s4Phase2Desc: Sensei Scanner Beta Release. Testnet Deployment. First "Golden Repair" Candidate Selection.
scroll.s4Phase3Desc: Mainnet Launch. $GOLD Token Generation Event (TGE). DAO Governance Activation.
